title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Language Lens: Iterable Protocol
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js iterable protocol increment in a collection-processing and streaming pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement and consume iterable and iterator protocols with correct done and value transitions.
Choose Map, Set, WeakMap, or WeakSet from key identity, enumeration, retention, and lookup needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
